executive_summary: Created 57 implementable tasks across 14 phases for admin panel. Covers infrastructure, API BlogPost (9 endpoints), auth, layout, CRUD for 5 entities, ContactForms, routing, and testing.

tasks.description: Install dependencies: @tiptap/react, @tiptap/starter-kit, @tanstack/react-query, react-router-dom, zod, slugify
Create folder structure: src/{api,hooks,components,pages,routes,types,utils}/
Create src/types/index.ts with AuthState, DashboardSummary, NavItem interfaces
Create src/utils/slugify.ts utility function
Create src/utils/getTextFromHTML.ts helper for TipTap validation
Setup TanStack Query Client in src/main.tsx with retry:1, refetchOnWindowFocus:false, staleTime:5min
Create src/api/client.ts with base URL from VITE_API_URL, interceptors for JWT from localStorage
Create src/api/auth.ts with login() POST /api/auth/login, store JWT as 'admin_token'
Create src/hooks/useAuth.ts with login/logout/isAuthenticated checks, JWT decode
Create src/components/auth/ProtectedRoute.tsx using @jsoft/shared ProtectedRoute pattern
Create src/components/auth/LoginForm.tsx with email/password, useAuth, @jsoft/shared Input/Button/ErrorMessage
Create src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx with NavItem array, collapse state, active route highlight
Create src/components/layout/Header.tsx with user info display and logout button
Create src/components/layout/DashboardLayout.tsx wrapper with Sidebar + Header + children
Create backend routes for BlogPost: GET /api/blog-posts, GET /api/blog-posts/:slug, GET /api/blog-posts/id/:id
Create backend routes for BlogPost: POST /api/blog-posts, PUT /api/blog-posts/:id, DELETE /api/blog-posts/:id
Create backend routes for BlogPost: PATCH /api/blog-posts/:id/restore, PATCH /api/blog-posts/:id/reorder, PATCH /api/blog-posts/:id/status
Create src/api/blogPosts.api.ts with 7 functions: getAll, getBySlug, getById, create, update, delete, updateStatus
Create src/hooks/useServices.ts with useGetAll, useGetById, useCreate, useUpdate, useDelete, useToggleFeatured
Create src/hooks/useProducts.ts with useGetAll, useGetById, useCreate, useUpdate, useDelete
Create src/hooks/useTools.ts with useGetAll, useGetById, useCreate, useUpdate, useDelete, useReorder
Create src/hooks/useSuccessCases.ts with useGetAll, useGetById, useCreate, useUpdate, useDelete
Create src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts with useGetAll, useGetById, useCreate, useUpdate, useDelete, useUpdateStatus
Create src/hooks/useContactForms.ts with useGetAll only (read-only)
Create src/pages/Dashboard.tsx with SummaryCards using useServices/useProducts/useTools/useBlogPosts/useContactForms
Create src/components/dashboard/SummaryCard.tsx using @jsoft/shared Card component
Create src/pages/services/ServicesList.tsx with pagination, filter, delete modal, useServices
Create src/pages/services/ServiceCreate.tsx with Zod validation using service.schema, useCreate
Create src/pages/services/ServiceEdit.tsx with pre-filled form from useGetById, useUpdate
Create src/components/services/ServiceTable.tsx using @jsoft/shared Table/Pagination
Create src/components/services/ServiceForm.tsx with @jsoft/shared Input/Button/ErrorMessage
Create src/pages/products/ProductsList.tsx with price filter, delete confirmation, useProducts
Create src/pages/products/ProductCreate.tsx with price validation, useCreate
Create src/pages/products/ProductEdit.tsx with pre-filled form, useUpdate
Create src/components/products/ProductTable.tsx using @jsoft/shared Table/Pagination
Create src/components/products/ProductForm.tsx with price field validation
Create src/pages/tools/ToolsList.tsx with HTML5 drag-and-drop, useTools, useReorder mutation
Create src/pages/tools/ToolCreate.tsx with optional link field, useCreate
Create src/pages/tools/ToolEdit.tsx with pre-filled form, useUpdate
Create src/components/tools/ToolList.tsx with drag handlers, visual feedback during drag
Create src/components/tools/ToolForm.tsx with link validation (URL optional)
Create src/pages/success-cases/SuccessCasesList.tsx with client filter, useSuccessCases
Create src/pages/success-cases/SuccessCaseCreate.tsx with testimonial field, useCreate
Create src/pages/success-cases/SuccessCaseEdit.tsx with pre-filled form, useUpdate
Create src/components/success-cases/SuccessCaseTable.tsx with client column
Create src/components/success-cases/SuccessCaseForm.tsx with testimonial textarea
Create src/components/blog-posts/TipTapEditor.tsx with StarterKit extensions, onUpdate handler
Create src/pages/blog-posts/BlogPostsList.tsx with status filter (DRAFT/PUBLISHED), useBlogPosts
Create src/pages/blog-posts/BlogPostCreate.tsx with TipTapEditor, slug auto-generation, content validation min 100 chars
Create src/pages/blog-posts/BlogPostEdit.tsx with pre-filled TipTap content, useUpdate
Create src/components/blog-posts/BlogPostTable.tsx with status badge, filter controls
Create src/components/blog-posts/BlogPostForm.tsx with Title/Slug/Status/TipTapEditor fields
Create src/pages/contact-forms/ContactFormsList.tsx with date filter, pagination, useContactForms
Create src/components/contact-forms/ContactFormTable.tsx with expandable rows or modal for details
Create src/components/contact-forms/ContactFormDetail.tsx or modal view for full message
Create src/routes/index.tsx with React Router v7 nested routes: /login, / (DashboardLayout wrapper)
Configure all routes: dashboard, services/*, products/*, tools/*, success-cases/*, blog-posts/*, contact-forms
Update src/App.tsx with QueryClientProvider, RouterProvider, wrap with DashboardLayout where needed
Update src/main.tsx to render App with StrictMode
Manual testing: Auth flow (login → token → redirect → 401 logout)
Manual testing: Services CRUD (create → list → edit → delete with modal confirmation)
Manual testing: BlogPost with TipTap (content validation <100 chars, slug generation)
Manual testing: Tools drag-to-reorder → PATCH /api/tools/:id/reorder
Manual testing: BlogPost status filter → only show DRAFT/PUBLISHED
UI polish: Responsive Sidebar (<768px collapse), loading states, error boundaries
Verify all protected routes redirect to /login when no token
Verify API client interceptor removes token and redirects on 401

risks: BlogPost API completely missing - 9 new endpoints needed in backend (Phase 4 is critical path)
TipTap integration complexity - Phase 11.1 requires careful setup with StarterKit extensions
HTML5 drag-and-drop for Tools reorder (Phase 9.1, 9.4) - potential browser compatibility issues
JWT expiration handling not explicitly defined - may need refresh token logic later
React Router v7 nested routes syntax - verify compatibility with React 19
